discrepancies.notes: Existing director confirmed. Oversees curriculum K-12 including the Preschool Outreach Program (POP) and Learning Center Preschool. South Windsor email format is firstname.lastname@southwindsorschools.org per district staff resources page.

REPLACEMENT: Existing director_existing 'Susan Fergusson, Assistant Superintendent' appears INCORRECT - Susan Fergusson is at Torrington Public Schools (per LinkedIn/RocketReach), not Tolland. Tolland's actual Director of Curriculum and Instruction is Carolyn Tyl (per RocketReach/LinkedIn). Tolland Superintendent is Walter Willett, Ph.D. Email inferred from confirmed Tolland pattern [first initial][last]@tolland.k12.ct.us (e.g., tpoland, tmccluskey, jpalumbo).

Replacement recommended over input record. Input listed Robert Testa (Asst Superintendent, rtesta@vernon-ct.gov), but Carole Kerkin is the actual dedicated Pre-School Program Coordinator at Vernon's Central Office and is a better-fit ECE persona match.

Replacement recommended: Input lists 'Elizabeth Bumgardner' as Willington Director of Early Childhood Center, but Bumgardner actually works at Windham Public Schools (Director of Windham Early Childhood Center, e***@windhamps.org), NOT Willington. Willington has no dedicated ECE director; the AM Pre-K program at Center Elementary is overseen by Marcia McGinley as Director of Pupil Services. Email pattern @willingtonct.org per ZoomInfo (m***@willingtonct.org).
